Exam.title: Exam
Exam.description: Represents an online electronic exam created by a teacher.

teacherName.description: The name of the teacher who created the exam.

duration.description: Duration of the exam in minutes.

code.description: 6-character unique code to access the exam.

createdBy.description: Teacher user ID who owns this exam.

questions.description: List of questions for this exam.

isFavorite.description: Whether this exam is marked as a favorite for quick access.

Submission.title: Submission
Submission.description: Represents a student's submission for an exam.

answers.description: Key-value of questionId and student answer.

score.description: Score obtained by auto-grading objective questions.

/exams/{examId}/submissions/{submissionI.description: Submissions subcollection for a given exam, completed by students.
